tagline: Full-width warning pinned above the Content Area — a nudge with one action.
whenToUse: Warning Banner is a constrained warning FxAlert stretched full-width and pinned below the Top Navigation at the sticky layer, so a whole-account nudge stays visible while the user works. Use it for verification prompts, an expiring payment method or a plan limit being approached — situations that warrant attention but not a blocking dialog. It carries at most a single action plus an optional dismiss; the icon-only dismiss button always has an accessible name and tone is conveyed by the warning icon and the text, never colour alone. Dismissal is host-persisted via dismissKey — the component hides itself and fires onDismiss so the host can remember not to show it again. Show at most one at a time and queue the rest by priority.
